overview.description: Collaborative data science and analytics notebook platform for data teams
overview.description_long: Deepnote is a cloud-based data workspace where agents and humans work together. Built on top of the Jupyter standard, it provides real-time collaboration, AI-powered code generation and analysis, integrated Python/SQL/R support, dashboards and data apps, scheduled notebooks, GPU access, and 100+ data source integrations. Used by 500,000+ data professionals and 80+ of the top 100 universities worldwide. Recently open-sourced.
overview.tagline: Data workspace where agents & humans work together

history.origin_story: Founded in early 2019 by Czech engineers Jakub Jurovych (ex-Mozilla) and Jan Matas who wanted to fix broken collaboration in data science tooling. Joined Y Combinator Summer 2019 batch.

key_milestones.event: Founded; accepted into Y Combinator Summer 2019 batch
Raised $3.8M seed round led by Index Ventures and Accel (Feb 2020)
Raised $20M Series A co-led by Index Ventures and Accel (Jan 2022)
Reached usage in 80+ of the top 100 universities globally
Recognized by Gartner in 2025 Market Guide for Augmented Analytics
Announced open-source release of core platform

awards: Gartner 2025 Market Guide for Augmented Analytics (industry leader)

metadata.notes: Company was founded by Czech engineers and is in the Prague AI ecosystem catalog, but official HQ is San Francisco per LinkedIn. Remote-first with a Prague engineering office. Total funding calculated as seed ($3.8M) + Series A ($20M) = $23.8M. Employee count of 19 from LinkedIn as of March 2026. The company recently open-sourced its core platform. 500,000+ users including 80+ of the top 100 universities.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (data_engineering) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Well-funded with 2 known funding round(s). Has runway for continued operations.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong position across assessed risk dimensions with clear moats or stability factors.
